voxelforge.description: AI-powered voxel game creation — 32 tools for terrain, buildings, characters, sprites, HTML5 games, narrative pipelines, and more

instructions:
You have access to VoxelForge Studio tools. Use them to generate complete game assets. Key workflows:
1. Full game: call generate_game(title, genre)
2. HTML5 game: call generate_html5_game(prompt)
3. Narrative pack: call run_asset_pipeline(theme, genre)
4. Individual assets: generate_terrain/building/character/prop/dungeon
5. AI sprites: generate_sprite(prompt, style)
6. Batch sprites: generate_batch_sprites(prompts, style)
7. Free LLM: llm_chat(prompt, task='creative') — auto-selects best free provider
